name: Heartbeat Love
overview: Bai Suji mistakenly accuses An Yufeng of theft and tricks him into taking her bracelet. At Xinghua University, she starts the 'Little White Heart-Beating Club' to address the scarcity of boys, but soon discovers An Yufeng is her rival, establishing his own club. Both clubs must match 50 couples in 100 days to avoid disbandment.

trailers.title: 【心跳恋爱 Heartbeat Love】OST：《心跳恋爱》片头曲剧情版MV正式上线！ | 苏晓彤/左林杰 | 青春爱情片 | 优酷 YOUKU
